description:
This quiz evaluates a developer's proficiency with modern JavaScript features spanning ES2015 through ES2022 via multiple-choice questions. It presents a moderately challenging difficulty level, playfully questioning how tricky the concepts might actually be. The informal, emoji-friendly tone keeps the assessment engaging while rigorously testing up-to-date language knowledge.
Topics: JavaScript, ECMAScript (ES2015-ES2022), Modern Web Development, Language Features
Audience: Frontend and full-stack developers seeking to validate or refresh their modern JavaScript knowledge
